title: Vanilla: Expanded!
description: A Modpack for Everyone! Feel like your Playing Minecraft for the First Time Again! MC 1.21.1
body:
# Get ready for the Ultimate Minecraft Experience!
![general explanation of the modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e55716b3826b160a3bd4a1f3937ff77bb0bfaaa9.png)

**Enhancing the Game with Many Features and Good Integration.**

[Join the Discord!](https://discord.gg/X6TAsTz8NQ)
# Content
**Adventure** 🌎                           
- New & Overhauled Biomes
- Overhauled Biomes
- Overhauled Journey to the End
- Improved Archaeology
- New & Overhauled Structures

**Combat** ⚔️
- Overhauled Combat Mechanics
- New Boss & Mini-Bosses
- Different Damage Types
- New & Unique Weapons
- Gear Reforging
- Overhauled Ender Dragon Fight
- Different Types of Armor

**Farming** 🌾
- New ways to Cook Food
- New Crops
- New Food Types
- Seasons

**Tech** 🛠️
- New Redstone Components
- More Coming Soon!

**Magic** 🔮
- Enchantment Imbuing
- New Enchantments
- Rituals
- Spellcasting
- More Coming Soon!
  
### Other Features
- Easy Multiplayer Support with e4mc
- Improved Visuals
- Bug Fixes
- Many new Decorational Blocks
- Balance Changes
- Many Quality of Life Features
- Regular Modpack Updates

# Roadmap
The following features are going to be implemented.

- Visuals: Expanded! ✅
- End: Expanded! ✅
- Armors: Expanded! ✅
- Multiplayer: Expanded! ✅
- Aquatic: Expanded! 
- Forging: Expanded! ✅
- Quality of Life: Expanded! ✅ 
- Mobs: Expanded!
- Magic: Expanded! ✅
- Advancements: Overhauled! 

Report Issues Here: [https://github.com/EyeOfTheEagle/Vanilla-Expanded/issues](https://github.com/EyeOfTheEagle/Vanilla-Expanded/issues)

# Credits
- A big thank you to all the Amazing Mod & Resourcepack Authors, make sure to check out their work!
